title: Don't Disconnect
description: Prevents you from accidently disconnecting by swapping the disconnect and return to game buttons!
body:
Prevents you from accidently disconnecting by swapping the disconnect and return to game buttons!
It's as simple as that!

![Shows Disconnect and Back to Game buttons swapped on the Minecraft Pause screen.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xsQHlMMK/images/15e6e5ec64438fad96d97b7ddca01d45ec6c8412_350.webp)
